name: Ribollita
recipeIngredient: 1 Small yellow summer squash, sliced into rounds
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
1 can (16 oz) Dark red kidney beans
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the chicken stock, white wine, and chicken wings. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer for 25 minutes. Strain the stock, discarding the wine (or reserve it for another use), and set aside.
2. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
3. Heat 7 cups of olive oil in a large skillet. Add leeks, onions, carrots, and celery. Sauté until slightly wilted, about 10 minutes. Add red and green peppers and sauté another 5 minutes. Then add yellow squash, zucchini, and cabbage, cooking another 10 minutes.
4. Remove the skillet from heat. Add spinach, oregano, salt, pepper, tomatoes, and kidney beans.
5. Cut crusts off bread; lightly toast slices.
6. Spread half vegetable mixture in a large ovenproof casserole's bottom. Layer toast on top, then remaining vegetable mixture.
7. In a small skillet, heat remaining 2 cups olive oil. Add garlic and sauté until lightly browned. Spoon over vegetables.
8. Add reserved stock to the casserole; sprinkle with Parmesan cheese. Bake for 40 minutes. Serve hot.
